title: RNA G4 folding MD simulations
author: Pavlina Pokorna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
version 2 contains data for both (GGGA)3GGG and (GGGUUA)3GGG sequences [version 1 contains (GGGA)3GGG only] 
  HILLS  - raw bias files, not averaged 
  reactive_trajs -  full reactive trajectories 
  reactive_traj_stride100 -  reactive trajectories strode by 100 for a fast visualization 
   reference_replicas  - full reference replica ensembles 
   input_files  - input, run, and visualization files, see  this GitHub repo  for details 
   videos   - higher resolution videos than those found in  this GitHub repo.
